hero_title_accent: Compliance Workflow for Digital Asset Exchanges
hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams handle failed VASP Travel Rule messages by connecting routing exceptions, case management, wallet data, and audit evidence into one structured workflow.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Travel Rule message failures disrupt workflows
problem_description: Failed or incomplete Travel Rule messages introduce delays and manual effort in compliance review for digital asset exchanges. This fragmentation hinders clear tracking of exceptions and weakens audit evidence for regulatory reporting and internal oversight.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates failed message data, originator and beneficiary details, exception statuses and audit evidence into a unified workflow enabling exchanges to track, review and report Travel Rule failures with clearer operational control.
workflow_title: From failed Travel Rule messages to cases
workflow_description: SFTY captures failed or incomplete Travel Rule messages, routes exceptions into case reviews, records evidence and supports compliance reporting workflows for VASPs.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond message routing. Evidence-ready Travel Rule workflows
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects failed Travel Rule messages, exceptions, originator data and cases into one structured workflow with audit evidence to support review and regulatory reporting.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports exchanges managing failed Travel Rule messages with controlled provider orchestration, audit-ready evidence and enterprise deployment for compliant operational workflows.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for Travel Rule operations?
faq_1_answer: SFTY structures Travel Rule messages, routing status, exceptions, cases and audit evidence into a connected compliance workflow for VASPs, exchanges and digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle failed VASP messages?
faq_2_answer: SFTY detects, routes and escalates failed or incomplete VASP Travel Rule messages into cases for manual review and resolution within a controlled workflow.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve Travel Rule evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY records case history, decision logs and message data to preserve audit-ready evidence supporting Travel Rule compliance reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing Travel Rule providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects with multiple Travel Rule providers and orchestrates their outputs into one operational workflow without disrupting existing integrations.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace Travel Rule messaging providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace Travel Rule messaging providers but connects their outputs into structured cases, evidence and reporting layers.
final_title: Structure failed Travel Rule messages with SFTY
final_description: Review how SFTY connects failed message exceptions, routing data, cases and audit evidence into one controlled compliance workflow.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
